overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a foggy medieval covered bridge and emerging into open countryside at dusk. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with reduced visibility, featuring occasional NPC encounters along a dirt path through rolling hills.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone bridge with wooden roof beams

events.description: approaching the stone archway exit at the end of the covered bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered bridge toward the distant archway exit

notable_agents.action: peasant leaning against the stone wall
guard standing watch near the bridge exit

entered.detail: medieval stone bridge with wooden roof framework and open sides
exposed dark wooden support beams overhead
weathered stone walls lining both sides of the bridge
large stone archway marking the exit to open countryside

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit covered bridge with wooden beams overhead and stone walls on either side. A few NPCs stand along the walls as the character approaches the bright archway exit at the far end of the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path through rolling foggy hills

events.description: exits the covered bridge into open countryside with full sky visibility
passing a group of peasants walking along the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding dirt path through misty countryside, passing occasional travelers

notable_agents.action: peasant in blue tunic walking along the path edge

entered.detail: rolling hills and forested valleys under foggy dusk sky
solitary oak trees with full canopies dotting the landscape
low weathered stone walls lining the dirt path
castle towers visible through the mist on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the bridge, the scene opens into a wide foggy landscape at dusk. The character walks along a dirt path bordered by stone walls and scattered trees, with a distant castle visible through the mist. Occasional NPCs appear along the path as the journey continues through the rolling countryside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic interior of a medieval bridge into a vast, mist-shrouded countryside at dusk. It begins within a dimly lit covered bridge, moving past wooden beams and stone walls where NPCs stand as the character approaches a bright archway. As the camera emerges from the structure, the scene opens into a wide, foggy landscape where the lighting shifts to the muted tones of twilight. The journey then continues along a dirt path bordered by stone walls and scattered trees, passing occasional NPCs while a distant castle looms through the haze. Finally, the view expands across the rolling hills of the countryside as the character moves further into the atmospheric mist.
